heading: Step 3: In the  section of the cluster form, select a major version from the dropdown next to  that matches your cluster's .
body:
A warning banner appears indicating that your cluster's MongoDB version will be downgraded.**Api:**Atlas Administration APITo downgrade your cluster by one major version using the API, see
[Modify One Cluster from One Project](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-updategroupcluster).
